record_lane.notes: Val19 (wd4000, 1.1324) and Val21 (wd5000, 1.1342) also use 2700s but port the 2026-03-22 SOTA which is a different and newer script (specs/batch33/run_new_winner.py). Val19 is likely the true record-lane best at 1.1324.

non_record_lane.notes: Each +1500s gives ~-0.005 bpb. Val25 (7500s) and val26 (9000s) pending.

invalid_runs.val13_val_only: 0.9815 bpb — TRAIN_ON_VAL=1 violates rules, not valid
